bonds_intro_1: Amabondi kahulumeni ngokuvamile abizwa ngokutshalomali 'okungenangozi' futhi abhekwa njengendawo ephephile kunazo zonke yokugcina umcebo ngezezimali zendabuko.
bonds_intro_2: I-Bitcoin iyimali yedijithali esebenza ngokuzimela kunoma yimuphi uhulumeni noma isiphathimandla esiyinhloko.
bonds_intro_3: Kodwa ngabe amabondi ngempela awanangozi? Futhi aqhathaniswa kanjani ne-Bitcoin njengendawo yokugcina inani? Ake sihlole umehluko oyinhloko phakathi kwe-Bitcoin namabondi kahulumeni.
point_1_summary_1: Amabondi 'awanangozi' kuphela ngamazwi amadola angokwesibonelo, okusho ukuthi uzothola amadola akho uma ugcina kuze kuphele isikhathi. Kodwa lokhu akubheki ingozi yenfleshini, ingozi yezinga lenzalo, nokukhonakala kokuthi lawo madola azoba nenani elincane kakhulu lapho uwathola.
point_1_summary_2: I-Bitcoin inezingozi ezicacile, ezisobala (ukuguquguquka) kodwa ayinangozi yohlangothi oluphikisanayo efihliwe - uyinayo i-Bitcoin yakho noma awunayo.
point_2_summary_1: Lapho infleshini iphezulu kunenani lenzalo yamabondi, abanikazi bamabondi balahlekelwa amandla okuthenga unyaka ngamunye. Inani lenzalo lamabondi elingama-2% nenfleshini engama-4% kusho ukuthi ulahlekelwa amandla okuthenga angu-2% unyaka ngamunye.
point_2_summary_3: Inani elimisiwe le-Bitcoin lezinhlamvu eziyizigidi ezingu-21 lisho ukuthi ayikwazi ukwehliswa yinfleshini, kodwa amabondi angancishiswa ukuphrintwa kwemali.
point_3_summary_1: Ngesikhathi sezinkinga zezezimali, izimakethe zamabondi zingama futhi zibe nzima ukuthengiseka. Amabhange afana ne-Silicon Valley Bank ahlala nabondi abalahlekelwe inani elikhulu lapho amazinga enzalo enyuka, okwafaka isandla ekuweni kwawo.
point_3_summary_2: Funda ukuthi i-Silicon Valley Bank yahluleka kanjani nokuthi kungani i-Bitcoin ihlukile.
point_3_summary_3: I-Bitcoin ithengiswa 24/7 emhlabeni wonke futhi ayikaze ibe nenkinga yokuthengiseka - uhlala ungathola umthengi noma umthengisi.
point_4_summary_1: Ama-auction ka-Treasury angahluleka lapho kungenabo abathengi abanele besikweletu sikahulumeni. Lokhu kwenzeke izikhathi eziningi eminyakeni yakamuva, kufaka phakathi isidingo esibuthakathaka samabondi eminyaka engu-10 ngo-2022 namabondi eminyaka engu-30 ngo-2023.
point_4_summary_2: Funda kabanzi ngala ma-auction ka-Treasury ahlulekile.
point_4_summary_3: Intengo ye-Bitcoin itholakala ngezimakethe zomhlaba wonke ezihlala ziqhubeka ngaphandle kwe-auction yesigcawu engahluleka.
point_5_summary_1: Amanani enzalo yamabondi amisiwe lapho uwathengayo. Ngisho umnotho ukhula ngokushesha noma imali yehla kakhulu, inzuzo yakho ihlala injalo.
point_5_summary_2: I-Bitcoin inamathuba okukhula okukhulu njengoba ukwamukelwa kukhula nenani elimisiwe lihlangana nesidingo esikhulayo.
point_6_summary_1: Abantu abaningi bagcina amabondi ngabaphakathi njengamabhange, amabroka, noma izindawana, okudala ingozi yohlangothi oluphikisanayo. Awuwon amabondi ngqo.
point_6_summary_2: Nge-Bitcoin, ungathatha ubunini ngqo ngokuzigcinela, uqede ngokuphelele ingozi yohlangothi oluphikisanayo.
point_7_summary_1: Amabondi ancike ngokuphelele ekukwazini nasekuzimiseleleni kukahulumeni ukukhokha. Uma uhulumeni ubhekana nenkinga yezimali, uyahluleka, noma unquma ukukhuphulela infleshini, abanikazi bamabondi bayahlupheka.
point_7_summary_2: I-Bitcoin isebenza ngokuzimela kunoma yimuphi uhulumeni futhi ayikwazi ukulawulwa, ukuphakanyiswa nge-infleshini, noma ukuhluleka ukukhokha yiziphathimandla zezepolitiki.
